FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Geopolitical-Risk Premium and Rate Differential Support Tiered Long Structure
tldr_points: Geopolitical-risk premium and safe-haven asymmetry favor USD strength against JPY
Sticky US inflation and ECB hold tilt rate differentials toward USD carry retention
Technical posture remains constructive despite choppy risk tone, with dips absorbed near key MA structure
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY retains upside bias as US-Iran friction and hawkish Fed tilt widen rate spreads while technicals absorb JPY safe-haven flows.
FX.comment: Geopolitical risk and Fed-ECB divergence support USD/JPY upside on dips toward MA20.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Key macro tailwinds from Fed policy easing
Technical support at MA20 underpins momentum
Positive earnings outlook fuels upside Thesis
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 poised for an uptrend as Fed forecasts soften and technical support consolidates at MA20.
STOCKS.comment: Positive Fed outlook, earnings momentum, and MA20 support drive bullish stance.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Inflows and Mining Sector Expansion Drive Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: CoinShares reports $1.2B weekly net inflows to crypto funds led by BTC, signaling sustained institutional accumulation
Luxor and MicroBT finalize $100M mining rig deal with planned investment, bolstering network fundamentals
French prosecutors charge 88 individuals in crypto wrench attacks, reducing long-term systemic risk for institutions
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD bullish on $1.2B weekly institutional inflows and mining sector expansion, offsetting security risks
CRYPTO.comment: Sustained institutional inflows and mining sector expansion drive bullish momentum
